label: Core Same-Gender x50 (Female)
description: Use one gender reroll so the actor is Female, then zombify 50 same-gender targets through passive Blood Bar and manual grip.

steps.action: Use exactly one gender reroll so actor final gender is Female.
For each same-gender target: passive Blood Bar -> knock -> manual grip -> confirm zombie.
Check NPC only at safe milestones: 40, 45, 49, 50, then stop before extra rerolls.

constraints: Exactly one gender reroll for the clean route.
After the reroll, zombify same-gender targets only.
Targets can be any race and do not need to be unique.
Use passive Blood Bar whenever possible.
Every zombification must be manual grip.
No return/die/invade commands for clean tests.
Zombies do not need to do anything.
No Volt/mode requirement for clean tests.
Do not add a second gender reroll unless deliberately resetting after a failed route.

label: Appearance Mirror / Character Copy after x50 (Female)
description: After the one-reroll x50 same-gender zombification core, probe the tail pair: copy or mirror another player's character appearance without item/accessory requirements + zombify a same-gender target while the character-copy/mirror relation is active.

steps.action: Use exactly one gender reroll so actor final gender is Female.
For each same-gender target: passive Blood Bar -> knock -> manual grip -> confirm zombie.
Check NPC only at safe milestones: 40, 45, 49, 50, then stop before extra rerolls.
copy or mirror another player's character appearance without item/accessory requirements
zombify a same-gender target while the character-copy/mirror relation is active
Check Jugram/Balance. If failed, swap the order of task A/B only.
